action.reasoning: The root task is to build a full-stack todo app, which involves distinct phases: schema design, backend implementation, frontend implementation, and integration testing. These phases have clear dependencies (backend depends on schema, frontend depends on backend, tests depend on both). I will decompose this into four subtasks. The schema design is the first step. The backend and frontend can be developed in parallel once the schema is defined. Integration tests will run last. I will take the role of orchestrating the final assembly and ensuring the project structure is coherent.

subtasks.goal: Design the database schema and data models for the todo app.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask defines the core data structure. It should output a schema definition (e.g., SQL or NoSQL) and any necessary ORM models or type definitions. This is the foundation for the backend and frontend.

outputs.description: Database schema definition and data models for the todo app.

subtasks.goal: Implement the backend API for the todo app.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask builds the server-side logic. It should implement CRUD operations for todos based on the schema designed in root.1. It should output the backend code and API documentation.

subtasks.goal: Implement the frontend UI for the todo app.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask builds the client-side interface. It should implement a user interface that interacts with the backend API defined in root.2. It should output the frontend code.

subtasks.goal: Write integration tests for the full-stack todo app.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask ensures the system works end-to-end. It should write tests that verify the interaction between the frontend and backend, and the backend and database. It depends on both backend and frontend implementations.

outputs.description: Integration test suite for the todo app.

self_role.goal: Assemble the final project structure and documentation.

outputs.description: Final project directory structure and README with setup instructions.

self_role.condition: completed("root.1") AND completed("root.2") AND completed("root.3") AND completed("root.4")

subtasks.goal: Set up frontend project structure and core infrastructure
subtasks.capsule: Initialize a React/Vite project with TypeScript, set up routing (React Router), HTTP client (axios/fetch wrapper with JWT auth interceptor), global state management (Context API or Zustand), and basic layout components. This provides the foundation for all other components.

outputs.description: Project configuration files, base layout, routing setup, and API client module.

subtasks.capsule: Build login and registration forms that interact with /auth/login and /auth/register endpoints. Include form validation, error handling, JWT token storage, and protected route logic. Components should handle loading states and display API errors gracefully.

outputs.description: Login form, registration form, auth context/provider, and protected route wrapper.

subtasks.capsule: Build components for listing, creating, editing, and deleting todos. Include a todo list view with filtering (all/active/completed), pagination controls, a todo form for create/edit, and individual todo display with completion toggle and priority indicator. Interact with /todos endpoints.

outputs.description: Todo list, todo form, todo item, and todo detail components with full CRUD functionality.

subtasks.capsule: Build components for listing and creating tags, and for associating tags with todos. Include a tag list sidebar, tag creation form, and tag selection UI within the todo form. Interact with /tags endpoints.

outputs.description: Tag list, tag form, and tag selector components for todo association.

self_role.goal: Integrate all frontend components into a complete, cohesive application

outputs.description: Complete frontend UI implementation code, integrating all components into a working application.
